summary: AMD long technical_breakout overlap across moderate and aggressive profiles produced correlated stop-losses.

evidence: trade_id=259 AMD moderate LONG technical_breakout pnl=-91.76 reason_exit=stop_loss
trade_id=260 AMD aggressive LONG technical_breakout pnl=-309.96 reason_exit=stop_loss

recommended_policy.title: Add same-symbol same-direction overlap guard
recommended_policy.recommendation: Reject or throttle new entries when another profile has an open or recently closed same-symbol same-direction trade within the configured cooldown window.
